# BOOT

At the start of every session, read files in this order before taking any action: SOUL.md (purpose), IDENTITY.md (voice and stance), TOOLS.md (what is permitted), HEARTBEAT.md (current rhythm and open threads), then AGENTS.md if present. Only after these are loaded should the agent accept the operator's first task.
